data.title: Aesthetic Surgery Journal Earns 4.2 Impact Factor; ASJ Open Forum Climbs to 2.3
data.description: GARDEN GROVE, Calif. - Aesthetic Surgery Journal (ASJ) and Plastic Surgery Journal retain their top positions as the leading journals in the field of aesthetic and plastic surgery. ASJ achieved an impressive increase in its Impact Factor, rising from 3.9 to 4.2. This accomplishment ranks ASJ 30th out of 321 surgery journals globally, solidifying its status as a prestigious publication in the industry.

data.title: Slipstream Expands Work Management and PMO Practice with Acquisition of Echolocity
data.description: In Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, Slipstream Life Sciences, a prominent technology consulting partner, has revealed the acquisition of Echolocity, a specialized consultancy in work and project management. Echolocity boasts over seven years of experience assisting organizations in enhancing clarity, aligning strategies with execution, and establishing conducive work environments. This acquisition signifies that clients now have access to a highly skilled work management and Project Management Office (PMO) team in the industry.

data.title: MITER Brands to Showcase Industry-Leading MI Windows and Doors and PGT Windows and Doors Products at the Southeast Building Conference (SEBC)
data.description: MITER Brands, a prominent group of window and door companies, is set to attend the Southeast Building Conference (SEBC) at the Orange County Convention Center in Orlando on July 29-30, 2026. MI Windows and Doors along with PGT Windows and Doors will be present at booth #215 to present a range of cutting-edge window and door options tailored for homeowners and industry experts across the Southeast region. SEBC is known as the biggest trade exhibition in the industry, drawing in a significant number of attendees each year.

data.title: Innoscience Secures Removal of Court-Enjoined Infineon GaN Products from Display at electronica China 2026
data.description: In Shanghai on July 2, 2026, Infineon Technologies had to take down specific gallium nitride (GaN) items from its display at electronica China 2026 following Innoscience's discovery that these products were under a Chinese court order restricting their showcase. The situation arose despite the growing popularity of GaN technology.

data.title: Mouser Electronics Honored with Top Global Distributor, Growth Awards from HARTING for Second Consecutive Year
data.description: In Dallas and Fort Worth, Texas, Mouser Electronics, a leading global distributor of electronic components and industrial automation products, has been awarded the Global High Service Distributor of the Year by HARTING. Along with this honor, Mouser was also recognized with the Distinguished Award for New Product Sales Growth. This marks the second year in a row that Mouser has received these esteemed awards. With a history dating back to 2003, Mouser continues to excel in providing exceptional service and driving sales growth in partnership with HARTING.

data.title: Potentia Takes a Victory Lap After Lionspeed GP's Historic Win at the 24 Hours of Spa
data.description: Celebrations are underway in The Woodlands, Texas as Potentia commemorates Lionspeed GP's historic win at the 24 Hours of Spa race. The team set a new record for the event and their victory is being honored. Additionally, there has been significant advancement at Heartland Industrial Park, signifying progress in the area. This news highlights achievements in both sports and industry, showcasing success and growth in the community.

data.title: PILOT PHOTONICS AWARDED €10.4 MILLION FROM EUROPEAN INNOVATION COUNCIL
data.description: Pilot Photonics, a Dublin-based company specializing in integrated photonics, has recently received approval for a recommended investment of up to €10.4 million from the Horizon Europe European Innovation Council (EIC) Accelerator. This significant funding marks a crucial step in the company's growth, as it prepares for a major shift from electronics to photonics. The investment is expected to support Pilot Photonics in advancing its innovative technologies and expanding its presence in the photonics market.

data.title: Full Service Collectibles Brokerage Nostalgix Surpasses $10 Million in Sales Just Four Months After Launch
data.description: Nostalgix, a private collectibles brokerage based in Seattle, revealed that in its initial four months, it has overseen over $10 million in transactions. Established by collector Nathan Howerton, the company focuses on high-end comic books, trading cards, and art. It provides a specialized, personalized service distinct from typical auction avenues, giving collectors a confidential and efficient method to buy and sell their items.

data.title: MSIG USA Supports Innovative DEG Fund to Expand Sustainable Investment Across Developing Markets
data.description: On July 2, 2026, MSIG USA revealed its involvement in a unique investment arrangement with DEG, a prominent private-sector development finance institution and a subsidiary of KfW Group. This initiative aims to secure funding and attract additional private capital for various ventures.

data.title: Alumni and Friends Support FHU Golf at Successful Second Annual Brentwood Golf Tournament
data.description: HENDERSON, Tenn. - The Second Annual Golf Fundraiser Tournament at Freed-Hardeman University successfully generated over $18,000 to aid the FHU Golf program. Taking place on June 8 at the Brentwood Country Club in Brentwood, Tennessee, the event celebrated the efforts of FHU Golf in boosting their resources for the upcoming season.

data.title: VoltServer and Eaton Form Strategic Partnership to Advance Next-Generation Power Distribution
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in East Greenwich, Rhode Island, VoltServer revealed a significant partnership with Eaton to enhance modern power distribution infrastructure. VoltServer, known for fault-managed power systems and the development of Digital Electricity®, is teaming up with Eaton to propel advancements in this area. This collaboration aims to bring about next-generation solutions in power distribution technologies.VoltServer, a pioneer in this field, is looking to leverage this partnership to continue innovating in power systems and enhance their offerings. Eaton, a key player in the industry, brings its expertise and resources to jointly push the boundaries of power distribution infrastructure. This strategic alliance signifies a significant step towards revolutionizing how power is distributed and managed. With both companies contributing their strengths to the partnership, the industry can expect cutting-edge developments that will shape the future of power systems.

data.title: Ovintiv to Host its Second Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call and Webcast on July 24, 2026
data.description: Denver-based Ovintiv Inc., a corporation listed on NYSE (OVV) and TSX (OVV), revealed intentions to host the conference call unveiling its Q2 2026 results at 9:00 a.m. MT on Friday, July 24, 2026. This follows the scheduled release of its financial and operational outcomes post-market closure on Thursday.

data.title: Landmark New England Journal of Medicine Paper Reveals Facts: Latinos in U.S. Indispensable to Nation's Prosperity, Health, Future
data.description: On July 2, 2026, a study published in the New England Journal of Medicine challenges the misconception that Latinos in the United States are net takers rather than contributors. The "Medicine and Society" analysis emphasizes the risks of perpetuating this unfounded belief. The research, conducted by a team of experts, highlights the positive impact of Latino communities in the country. This study brings attention to the crucial role Latinos play in various aspects of society, contradicting the harmful stereotype. It provides important insights into the significant contributions made by Latinos in the United States, urging a shift away from harmful narratives.

data.title: Machine Investment Group and Lionshead Capital Partners Acquire Atlanta Airport Marriott
data.description: A collaboration has successfully finalized the purchase of a 641-room hotel located in close proximity to Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport. The deal was completed on July 2, 2026, by Machine Investment Group (Machine), a real estate investment entity specializing in opportunistic, distressed, and unique scenarios within the market.
